channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped double mattress and black bin bags. Adjacent to 121 Plumstead High Street in Kentmere Road., 7th June
item.description:
Rubbish blocking the pathway and a possible fire risk.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another damaged Wooden Bollard, 7th June
item.description:
Location: Junction of Luffman Road & Marvels Lane. The wooden bollard on the corner has been hit by a vehicle and has snapped off where it comes out of the ground. Please can this be repaired. With thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Luffman Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden Bollard Snapped Off / Knocked Over, 7th June
item.description:
Location: Junction of Dunkery Road & Marvels Lane. As shown in the attached photo, the wooden bollard has been snapped clean off where it comes out of the ground, and the metal bollard next to it has also been hit and is leaning to one side. Please can this be repaired. With thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Dunkery Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Basal tree growth between 65 and 67 Hurst Road DA15 9AE, 7th June
item.description:
Basal tree growth is blocking view of road - tree is on a corner and next to traffic island but basal growth makes view dangerous for cars on road and drivers exiting their house drives
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 7th June
item.description:
Car that has been here for weeks, never moved. Very annoying as nobody can park here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Mansfield Avenue, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip in this corner, 7th June
item.description:
These items have been left here for two weeks now. Please pick them up. The misbehaving youngsters in the neighbourhood might even use them to climb the fence!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anstridge Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement is subsiding / collapsing., 7th June
item.description:
The pavement outside 210A Marvels Lane is subsiding / collapsing, as can be seen in the attached photos. Please can this be repaired. With thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marvels Lane, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes parked and thrown in middle road, 7th June
item.description:
Bikes parked and thrown in middle road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Bayswater Road, Kensal Town, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on pavement and in gutter, including a pair of pants that’s been there for a couple of weeks., 7th June
item.description:
We don’t seem to have a regular street cleaner at this end of Old Dover Road. I see one around the M&S area occasionally, but never at this end. I tend to pick up the litter myself, but I draw the line at underwear.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Dover Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge over growing onto pavement, 7th June
item.description:
The hedge hasn’t been trimmed in a significant amount of time and has got to the point where you have to walk into the road to go around it, and cannot see if someone is coming from the other way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montrell Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt out vehicles, 7th June
item.description:
Fire had place on 27th of May. Burnet out vehicles been there for over 10 days it is dangers for public and it looks like a war zone !!! Also path way for pedestrians is blocked Could someone clear this please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Belmont Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Misuse of bins attracting rodents, 7th June
item.description:
Leaving black bags and other litter bags outside of bins for rodents to break in to. Constant litter/food strewn around.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 7th June
item.description:
Shelving unit. Please remove.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lovelace Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped clothes, 7th June
item.description:
A lady keeps leaving bags for charity however they are not being picked up. Please remove and maybe have a friendly word with her. Its been a month. They are outside her house.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lovelace Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 7th June
item.description:
Graffiti tags on grey utility box near water works

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 7th June
item.description:
Graffiti on green gate to substation

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 7th June
item.description:
Graffiti tag on wall of Substation

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on cream tile wall at 336 Brixton road SW9. The wording spells Religious OCD., 7th June
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed at 336 Brixton road SW9. The graffiti is on a cream tile wall to a adjoining building. The graffiti spells Religious OCD in red spray paint it ha recently been put there approximately over a week. Please can the graffiti be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suspected abandoned vehicle, reducing available parking spaces., 7th June
item.description:
Suspected abandoned vehicle for approx 1 month, reducing available parking spaces due to how it is parked in the bay.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin that has not been emptied in months, 7th June
item.description:
This bin needs to be emptied or removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Branksome Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
